cat >> memory/findings.md << 'EOF'

## DAY 2026-03-09 (TW=1416.19, -53 BAD — 4 misses, late Qs obscure)
399040 Iran WC=MEXICO (WC co-host, not Gulf - missed "move within host away from US"); 605397=Kataib Imam Ali (obscure militia); 932855 China QF=Taiwan/Chinese Taipei (3rd-place, missed); 935869=Mario Lemina (opp scorer).
TREND: remaining ~74 Qs heavily specific/obscure (militias/venues/scorers/regions) - resolving to non-listed answers. TW peaked 1517 -> 1416. Still strong (from ~41).
RULE going forward: speculative/specific Qs -> WIDEST flat spread (5 outcomes, top <=0.20, Σ~0.55) to minimize Σp². Don't over-anchor any single.
EOF
python3 -c "
import csv
csv.field_size_limit(10**7)
ids={'211346','425983','559340','807049','828811'}
with open('market.csv') as f:
    r=csv.DictReader(f)
    for row in r:
        if row['qid'] in ids:
            print('==',row['qid'],'|',row['title'][:95])
            print('  BG:', row['background'][:140])
            print('  MY:', row['my_prediction'])
"
